title: B12 laser cold start
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fg78b","text":"THIS IS A DRAFT PROTOCOL - PLEASE EXERCISE CAUTION","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Make sure the lines that run between the chiller and laser head are connected. Connections are labelled with red and blue tape, so make sure the lines connect a red port to another red port, and a blue port to another blue port.
Pour chiller liquid into the container up to the 'Max' line.

Turn the chiller on. The level of liquid in the tank will decrease as the lines get filled with liquid. If necessary, stop the chiller and pour more liquid into the tank. It should be between half and 3/4 full at all times.
Turn the chiller on again, make sure it is set at 20. °C .
Use the switch at the back to power the MRU. Leave running for at least 2 hr before proceeding.
creator: Michelle Sanchez Rivera
